name: pnp-sp-dev-spfx-web-parts-react-gantt
title: React Gantt Chart Web Part
shortDescription: A SharePoint Framework (SPFx) web part that displays project tasks from a SharePoint list as an interactive Gantt chart. Built with @svar-ui/react-gantt and Fluent UI v9, it supports SharePoint pages, Microsoft Teams, and Microsoft 365 (Office) hosts.
longDescription: A SharePoint Framework (SPFx) web part that displays project tasks from a SharePoint list as an interactive Gantt chart. Built with @svar-ui/react-gantt and Fluent UI v9, it supports SharePoint pages, Microsoft Teams, and Microsoft 365 (Office) hosts.

references.name: Build your first SharePoint client-side web part
references.description: Client-side web parts are client-side components that run in the context of a SharePoint page. Client-side web parts can be deployed to SharePoint environments that support the SharePoint Framework. You can also use modern JavaScript web frameworks, tools, and libraries to build them.
